title: ixora coccinea var. lutea
intro: Ixora coccinea var. lutea, also known as the yellow flame of the forest, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ixora coccinea var. lutea include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
